heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
label: 150408 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The corporation shall have the sole and exclusive right to use the names “National American Indian Veterans, Incorporated” and “National American Indian Veterans”, and such seals, emblems, and badges as the corporation may lawfully adopt.

children.heading: .—Effect
children.label: b .—Effect
children.text: Nothing in this section interferes or conflicts with any established or vested rights.
